security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost data: blob:; media-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost blob: data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://unpkg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob:;

bundle.shortDescription: Offline audio soundboard for live performances
bundle.longDescription: Audio Pad is a professional offline-first soundboard for live events, theater, worship services, and streaming. Load and manage audio cues with fade controls, per-pad volume, drag-and-drop ordering, and local persistence.
